5.reason: [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; many compilers no longer support it, leading to compilation errors. Use 'fgets' instead.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-sc-1: 1.0 , reason:  [The function 'gets' is unsafe and has been removed from the C standard library since C11; many compilers no longer support it, leading to compilation errors. Use 'fgets' instead.]
